title: Add APNs support and complete the internal release path
summary: Extend Sloppy and the Apple client for device registration, APNs delivery, and internal testing distribution over the Tailscale-first deployment model.
scope: Device registration and preferences endpoints in Sloppy
APNs sender integration on the backend
Internal distribution and tester setup notes
acceptance_criteria: A registered device can receive a test push
Push opens the app into the intended route
The app works against a Tailscale-accessible Sloppy instance
Internal testers have a documented setup path
